steps.title: Product of roots = c/a (Vieta's formula)
steps.content: For the quadratic with $a = \frac{1}{62}$ and $c = -st$, the product of the two solutions is $\frac{c}{a} = \frac{-st}{1/62} = -62st$.

steps.title: Set equal to −2kst and solve for k
steps.content: $-62st = -2k \cdot st$ → $62 = 2k$ → $k = 31$. Therefore the correct value is 31.
